name: adweave
description: Opinionated B2C SaaS / DTC marketing workflow for Meta Ads via the AdWeave MCP. Ships the daily creative engine, metrics feedback loop, ad launch, creative production, competitor research, and a one-shot /adweave:ship-campaign that chains the full pipeline.

api_token.title: AdWeave API token
api_token.description: Optional AdWeave API token (aw_...). Skip if using OAuth (recommended).

default_brand_slug.title: Default brand slug
default_brand_slug.description: If you manage one brand, put its slug here to skip the picker at setup.

workspace_path.title: Workspace path
workspace_path.description: Where daily batches, tracker, and foundation docs live. Defaults to current working directory.
